rationale: Abstract Y sharpens the knowledge gap into two falsifiable questions, structures the methods into three explicitly labeled translational approaches for transparency, and delivers a more precisely calibrated conclusion that maps findings to mechanism and therapeutic implication without overclaiming.
loser_weakness: Abstract X most lacked structural clarity in the methods section and specificity in the knowledge gap statement, presenting both as undifferentiated prose that obscured the translational logic of the study design.
